title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 172 Anganwadi Worker Posts
description: UP Anganwadi has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 172 Anganwadi Worker Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in Intermediate (10+2) can grab this chance and apply for the UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 . Here, we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for. Use this li...
